<Exception> in exec: Server Response: 'generateAnalysisReport("def mapFunc(t){     // 按SecurityID分组，按DateTime排序     t_sorted = select SecurityID, DateTime, LastPx from t order by SecurityID, DateTime     // 计算1分钟收益率：LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1     result = select          DateTime as tradeTime,         SecurityID as securityId,         'Minute_Return_1' as factorname,         LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1 as value     from t_sorted context by SecurityID     // 过滤掉第一行（没有前一行数据）     result = select * from result where not isNull(value)     return result }", "mrExecute", string(priceSource["priceDbname"]), string(priceSource["priceTbname"]), string(priceSource["priceDate"]), string(priceSource["priceSymbol"]), string(priceSource["priceCol"]), "dfs://stockMinKSH", "stockMinKSH_v2") => generateAnalysisReport: res = eval(parseExpr(((template_name + "(") + concat((keys(analysis_param_dict) + "=") + keys(analysis_param_dict), ",")) + ")", analysis_param_dict)) => alphalensReportAnalysis: dicts = alphalens::alphalens::plot_factorAnalysis(factor, prices, groupby, binning_by_group, quantiles, bins, periods, filter_zscore, groupby_labels, max_loss, zero_aware, cumulative_returns, long_short, group_neutral, by_group) => alphalens::plot_factorAnalysis: factor_data = alphalens::get_clean_factor_and_forward_returns(factor, prices, groupby, binning_by_group, quantiles, bins, periods, filter_zscore, groupby_labels, max_loss, zero_aware, cumulative_returns) => alphalens::get_clean_factor_and_forward_returns: factor_data = alphalens::get_clean_factor(factor, forward_returns, groupby, binning_by_group, quantiles, bins, groupby_labels, max_loss, zero_aware) => alphalens::get_clean_factor: merged_data = eval(sql(sqlCol("*"), lsj(merged_data,factor_copy,colNames(factor_copy)[ : 2]))) => The leading arguments of a join operation must be tables.' script: 
selectedSourceInfo = inspectSource("dfs://stockMinKSH", "stockMinKSH_v2");
discoveredSources = getAllAvailableData();
priceSource = choosePriceSource(selectedSourceInfo, discoveredSources);
generateAnalysisReport(
    "def mapFunc(t){\n    // 按SecurityID分组，按DateTime排序\n    t_sorted = select SecurityID, DateTime, LastPx from t order by SecurityID, DateTime\n    // 计算1分钟收益率：LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1\n    result = select \n        DateTime as tradeTime,\n        SecurityID as securityId,\n        'Minute_Return_1' as factorname,\n        LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1 as value\n    from t_sorted context by SecurityID\n    // 过滤掉第一行（没有前一行数据）\n    result = select * from result where not isNull(value)\n    return result\n}",
    "mrExecute",
    string(priceSource["priceDbname"]),
    string(priceSource["priceTbname"]),
    string(priceSource["priceDate"]),
    string(priceSource["priceSymbol"]),
    string(priceSource["priceCol"]),
    "dfs://stockMinKSH",
    "stockMinKSH_v2"
)

<Exception> in exec: Server Response: 'Syntax Error: [line #3] Constant variable [t] can't be modified.starfish::facplfRun::starfish::facplfRun::facplf_mr_execute("def mapFunc(t){     // 按SecurityID分组，按DateTime排序     t = select SecurityID, DateTime, LastPx from t order by SecurityID, DateTime     // 计算1分钟收益率：LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1     result = select          DateTime as tradeTime,         SecurityID as securityId,         'Minute_Return_1' as factorname,         LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1 as value     from t context by SecurityID     // 过滤掉第一行（没有前一行数据）     result = select * from result where not isNull(value)     return result }", "dfs://stockMinKSH", "stockMinKSH_v2") => starfish::facplfRun::facplf_mr_execute: runScript(mapFuncString) => Syntax Error: [line #3] Constant variable [t] can't be modified.' script: starfish::facplfRun::facplf_mr_execute("def mapFunc(t){
    // 按SecurityID分组，按DateTime排序
    t = select SecurityID, DateTime, LastPx from t order by SecurityID, DateTime
    // 计算1分钟收益率：LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1
    result = select 
        DateTime as tradeTime,
        SecurityID as securityId,
        'Minute_Return_1' as factorname,
        LastPx / prev(LastPx) - 1 as value
    from t context by SecurityID
    // 过滤掉第一行（没有前一行数据）
    result = select * from result where not isNull(value)
    return result
}", "dfs://stockMinKSH", "stockMinKSH_v2")
